zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean de Joinville I於大約1225年5月1日出生時，他的父親Simon de Joinville I50歲，母親Countess Béatrix d'Auxonne34歲。他於1231年8月13日與Adelaide de Grandpré結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1317年12月24日享年92歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean de Joinville I于大约1225年5月1日出生时，他的父亲Simon de Joinville I50岁，母亲Countess Béatrix d'Auxonne34岁。他于1231年8月13日与Adelaide de Grandpré结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1317年12月24日享年92岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean de Joinville I was born about 1 May 1225, his father, Simon de Joinville I, was 50 and his mother, Countess Béatrix d'Auxonne, was 34. He married Adelaide de Grandpré on 13 August 1231. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 24 December 1317, at the age of 92.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean de Joinville I est né environ 1 mai 1225, son père, Simon de Joinville I, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Countess Béatrix d'Auxonne, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Adelaide de Grandpré le 13 août 1231. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 24 décembre 1317, à l’âge de 92 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean de Joinville I um 1. Mai 1225 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon de Joinville I 50 und seine Mutter Countess Béatrix d'Auxonne 34. Er hat am 13. August 1231 Adelaide de Grandpré geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. Dezember 1317 im Alter von 92 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Joinville I è nato il circa 1 maggio 1225, il suo padre, Simon de Joinville I, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Countess Béatrix d'Auxonne, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Adelaide de Grandpré il 13 agosto 1231. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 24 dicembre 1317, all'età di 92 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean de Joinville Iが約1225年5月1日に生まれた時，父Simon de Joinville Iは50歳，母Countess Béatrix d'Auxonneは34歳であった。1231年8月13日にAdelaide de Grandpréと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1317年12月24日に92歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de Joinville I(이)가 대략 1225년 5월 1일에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon de Joinville I(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess Béatrix d'Auxonne(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1231년 8월 13일 Adelaide de Grandpré(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1317년 12월 24일 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.about 1 May 1225–24 December 1317: aproximadamente 1 de maio de 1225–24 de dezembro de 1317
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Joinville I nasceu aproximadamente 1 de maio de 1225, seu pai, Simon de Joinville I, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Countess Béatrix d'Auxonne, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelaide de Grandpré em 13 de agosto de 1231. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 24 de dezembro de 1317, com 92 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean de Joinville I родился около 1 мая 1225 г., его отцу по имени Simon de Joinville I было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Béatrix d'Auxonne, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelaide de Grandpré 13 августа 1231 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 24 декабря 1317 г. в возрасте 92 лет.

es.about 1 May 1225–24 December 1317: aproximadamente 1 de mayo de 1225–24 de diciembre de 1317
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean de Joinville I nació aproximadamente 1 de mayo de 1225, su papá, Simon de Joinville I, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Countess Béatrix d'Auxonne, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Adelaide de Grandpré el 13 de agosto de 1231. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 24 de diciembre de 1317, a la edad de 92 años.
